message.content:
Reviewing the migration plan; I have serious concerns.
RISK: a single-weekend cutover leaves no rollback window if auth breaks.
RISK: re-implementing security-critical auth in-house with no external audit invites vulnerabilities.
RISK: there is no plan for migrating existing user sessions/tokens.
RISK: a compliance review of the new auth store is skipped entirely.
STANCE: dissent
